perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split screen: the top half shows a Japanese website 'Birthday Sushi' and the bottom half shows a young woman with braided hair and a plaid shirt looking curiously at the camera. (2) The woman interacts with her smartphone, scrolling through a digital calendar on the website; she stops to identify a result for April 30th. (3) A graphic of crab sushi appears on screen; the woman smiles, makes a peace sign, and gestures excitedly. (4) The scene shifts as she checks another date, September 29th, leading to a graphic of Inari sushi; she laughs uncontrollably, covering her mouth with her hand, then points toward the viewer while speaking enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately with a high-pitched female voice speaking energetically in Mandarin. (2) Short 'ding' sound effects punctuate the reveal of sushi results on the screen. (3) The female speaker's voice becomes more animated with loud, genuine laughter as the second sushi result is revealed. (4) The music remains constant in volume and tempo until the end of the video as the speaker continues her fast-paced narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: '日本最近流行' (Japan's recent trend) and '你的生日壽司是什麼?' (What is your birthday sushi?) in large white and yellow characters. (2) Functional: Dates such as '4月30日' and '9月29日' appear as the website is navigated. (3) Decorative: '螃蟹壽司' (Crab Sushi) and '稻荷壽司' (Inari Sushi) appear as results with an emotional, playful tone. (4) Functional: Variety-show style captions like '(企劃被無情嘲笑)' (Project was heartlessly ridiculed) and '(抱歉為同天生日的人)' (Sorry for people with the same birthday) appear during her laughter.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro to trend -> Personal demonstration -> Reaction to second result -> Call to action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with two braids, wearing a black and white plaid shirt over a black top, with gold hairpins.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A yellow wall with a shelf containing some items and a laptop on a desk in the foreground.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to entertain and share a viral internet trend from Japan regarding 'Birthday Sushi'. The creator uses her own birthday and another person's birthday to showcase the website's results, using humor and high-energy reactions to engage the audience and encourage them to find their own results.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on a fun website trend rather than a paid product promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing with variety-show style text overlays and expressive facial reactions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content relies heavily on the relatability of birthday-based 'horoscope' style content and the creator's charismatic personality.
